name: A nice Christmas in Gardenview
description:
Christmas is here and the Toons are all in for it!

I know I'm a bit late but I had to get a lot of info on the Christmas toons and some descriptions for the characters

I have a lil theory on the Christmas toons and its that they can only see the others and interact with children and guests before they get locked up in the Christmas floor for the entirety of the year until December.which is the reason bobette and rudie are always excited for Christmas since it's the only time they can see their friends
creator: Milky_wah
